generated_oml:
instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes, motors, gearboxes, and controllers for industrial manufacturing"
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current for MABI MAX 100 robot motors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring output angle of robot joints"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance ActualPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring actual position of robot axes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ActualPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance TargetPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring target position setpoints for robot axes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TargetPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance OutputAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

instance ActualPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ActualPositionSensor
]

instance TargetPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TargetPositionSensor
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current time series data from physical robot via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle time series data from physical robot via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance ActualPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual position time series data from physical robot via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ActualPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TargetPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Target position setpoint data from physical robot via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TargetPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for multi-level abstraction (requirements, functional, logical, product/technical layers)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for dynamic behavior simulation and control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL model for architectural description of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc model for component interconnections and behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of robot components and interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for dynamic simulation and control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables RobotSimulationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for live data streaming from physical system to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for structural modeling of robot components using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides RobotModelingInsight
]

instance RobotSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for dynamic simulation and control algorithm implementation using Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of robot sensor data via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance RobotModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of MABI MAX 100 robot components and interfaces"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for MABI MAX 100 robot operational dynamics"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status monitoring of MABI MAX 100 robot components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow; it does not push data or commands back to the physical system, as defined in the reference model where communication is strictly physical-to-virtual."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data captured as time series for live-data linking between physical and digital components; specific synchronization frequencies, latency requirements, or temporal granularity details are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Structured according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model (Fig. 1), defining components such as Asset (physical entity representation), Source (data sources), and Processing (data aggregation and abstraction); Concrete Digital Shadow Model (Fig. 5) implements these concepts for specific purposes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for transmitting time series sensor data between physical and virtual components as the specified communication protocol for network infrastructure."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration via MQTT for sensor data streaming, Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as an interoperability standard for semantic data exchange, and connection to Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for machine control."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes industry standards such as SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) [17], and architecture description languages including ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25], [26], and SysML IBDs [17], [27] for component & connector-based modeling. These standards facilitate interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders and perspectives [31]."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The physical safety cell of the Mabi robotic arm (Max-100-2-25-p) restricts the maximum working range to [-90°, 90°], ensuring mechanical safety limits during operation."
]
